result.name: Shield of two skies
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Form: Small hexagonal amulet Effect: Upon activation, the amulet creates a faint glow around the wearer that provides +2 to Armor against heat and cold (or +3 for artifact level 6 and higher). The effect lasts for ten minutes. Depletion: 1 in 1d100

sections.name: Shield of two skies

Form: Small hexagonal amulet

Effect: Upon activation, the amulet creates a faint glow around the wearer that provides +2 to Armor against heat and cold (or +3 for artifact level 6 and higher). The effect lasts for ten minutes.

Depletion: 1 in 1d100
